mapper.insert: insert into movmov_wish_movies (wish_movie_no, wish_movie_created_date, movie_no, user_id) values (wish_movie_no_seq.nextval, sysdate, #{movie.no}, #{user.id})
mapper.select: select wish_movie_no as no , wish_movie_created_date as createdDate , movie_no as "movie.no" , user_id as "user.id" from movmov_wish_movies where user_id = #{userId} and movie_no = #{movieNo}
select wish_movie_no as no , wish_movie_created_date as createdDate , movie_no as "movie.no" , user_id as "user.id" from movmov_wish_movies where user_id = #{userId}
